query:
SELECT 
  CASE 
    WHEN matchScore >= 80 THEN '80-100 (Strong)'
    WHEN matchScore >= 60 THEN '60-79 (Good)'
    WHEN matchScore >= 40 THEN '40-59 (Medium)'
    WHEN matchScore >= 21 THEN '21-39 (Weak)'
    ELSE '0-20 (Minimal)'
  END as scoreTier,
  COUNT(*) as cnt
FROM collateralProjectMatches 
WHERE collateralItemId = '1'
GROUP BY scoreTier
ORDER BY scoreTier DESC;
